content.json:
## Identity and sign-in analysis
---
Failed sign-in pressure on this tenant: who is being targeted, from where, and whether legacy authentication is still in play. Requires the Entra ID (SigninLogs) connector.

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize Failures = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Failed sign-ins over time

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize Failures = count(), DistinctIPs = dcount(IPAddress) by UserPrincipalName
| order by Failures desc
| take 20
content.title: Most-targeted accounts

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize Failures = count(), TargetedAccounts = dcount(UserPrincipalName) by IPAddress, Location
| order by Failures desc
| take 20
content.title: Top failing source IPs

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where ClientAppUsed !in ('Browser', 'Mobile Apps and Desktop clients', '')
| summarize Attempts = count() by ClientAppUsed, Success = iff(ResultType == 0, 'Success', 'Failure')
| order by Attempts desc
content.title: Legacy authentication attempts, by client app
